transcript.text:
[Gapyeong-gun, Gyeonggi-do] [Yongso waterfall]
[A solo relaxing trip]
[Drinking makgeolli (Korean traditional alcohol) by the valley]
Why is the sky blue?
I want to be a cloud
[Recharging is all about mukbang]
Total 8 servings please
I said 2 servings are enough for one person!
No, it's not
Wow, this is a lot!
Sir, may I add some udon noodles please?
Can I eat now?
No doubt that she's a real mukbanger
She's eating the whole thing by herself
[A relaxing trip at a clean valley, produced by Tzuyang X Gyeonggi province]
Hello everyone

I am here at Gapyeong county today
I heard that there's a beautiful waterfall called Yongso, where I can relax and enjoy.
But I'll eat first before heading there
There's an important thing. It's this card
I made this card and put in $1000 worth of marketplace currency last time.
On top of the funds, I also received 10% more and spent all of it at the market
They also have the place where I can use the marketplace currency here
Tap to register card and
scan the barcode
120,000 Won (~$100) should be more than enough
I put 120,000 Won in and received extra 12,000 Won
It has the sign "6 O'clock at My Hometown"
It's a dakgalbi restaurant
Let's head inside
Excuse me, good afternoon
They have chicken intestine on the menu

I'm curious
6 servings?
Let's do 7
Actually, should I go for 8?
Excuse me
2 orders of chicken intestine
and 6 orders of dakgalbi please
No, order 2 orders of dakgalbi and 1 for the intestine
Nope, total 8 servings
That's too much
Trust me, just do 2 and 1
Do as I say!
I'm sorry? Huh??
2 servings are more than enough for 1 person!
[Just give her as much as she wants!]
Excuse me, sir.

But I just want only 1 serving's worth of veggies
Wow, it's a lot
It looks tasty
Can I also add some udon noodles please?
Yes, I'll put them in after it's fully cooked
It's hot
It's quite a lot of food
So happy
The portions are very large
This restaurant was on my TV show called "6 O'clock at My Hometown"
Since I'm the reporter of the show, I feel like I'm in my hometown
[Cooking it from the other side as well]
[Devoted]
How do you do it?
It smells amazing
The intestine looks pretty interesting

What kinds of organs are they?
Intestine and heart
When do I turn off the stove?
A little later
Can I eat?
Bon appetit!
It must be tasty!
Let's try the meat first
It's hot
It's so hot
I have this strong feeling that it's going to get tastier the more I eat
because, for dakgalbi, if the first bite is salty, you get sick of it really quick
But if you can tell that it is seasoned lightly with the first bite, it normally gets tastier later on
It's like...
It tastes like a bland homemade dakgalbi
Is it tasty even though you are eating alone?

Yes, the food tastes better because I eat alone
It's got lots of rice cakes in it. The rice cake has a little hole inside
Let's try the chicken intestine
Doesn't it look interesting?
The word "organs" may sound like it's stinky, but it's not
The taste becomes richer the more I chew
Let me try both the meat and the intestine together
I think I can finish it quickly
I thought that the marketplace currency can only be used in the city where I live in
But I noticed that it can be used across the whole Gyeonggi province
Since you are likely to spend around $2~300 when you go on a travel, it's a great deal to get the additional 10% credit and use the card
So that's worth 1 order of dakgalbi when you put 100,000 Won in
Let's try with lettuce wraps since it's here
Put a piece of dakgalbi, intestine, rice cake, sweet potato, .....
Thank you
sesame leaf

one more piece of dakgalbi
One more
One more
It's too big
It's very tender
Since this place was on my TV show, I'm going to do the same thing that I always do on the show
It's called making a skewer
I'm running out of the meat!
I still have a lot of yeomtong (heart) and intestine left
Dak-kkochi (chicken skewer)!
A rice cake at the end
It's done
I can't eat this in one bite
I feel pressured because I always eat it in one bite on the show
I'll finish it in 2 bites
I think it's time to add some noodles

Excuse me~
Can you please stir fry 2 orders of udon noodles
Oh no, it comes with lettuce
Can you put just a little please? It's not a lot when wilted.
Oh okay then
You can put it back in, ma'am
Udon noodles~
Is this 2 servings?
Yep, did you enjoy the dakgalbi?
Absolutely
OMG, it looks fantastic
How come you don't even get fat eating this much food
It looks so yummy
I kinda want to try fried rice too
But I gotta get going
to the waterfall

I'll eat more when I get there
Udon noodles are the best
The intestines are chewy and savory when lightly cooked
But it gets tough like the heart when overcooked
How did you eat all of it with that tiny body?
I thought that you can barely eat one-third of it
Did you really finish all of it?!
I connected this card to my Samsung Pay
Log into Samsung Pay
Tap "card"
So now I can use the marketplace currency and pay with my phone
Do you guys accept the Gyeonggi marketplace currency
Yes, we do
-Can I pay with my phone? -Of course.
Just pay for the meat only, sweetie
No no I can't

You have to count the noodles at least. Alright, you won.
I need to pay for the beverages as well.
$90 total
Thank you very much!
Thank you
Before heading to the waterfall,
I am going to stop by a local food product market
I'm going to buy some snacks to eat at the waterfal
Let's head inside
They have a corn flavor makgeolli
and sweet potato flavor too
A pine nut flavor makgeolli as well
I can't be just buying drinks only
They got a pine nut flavor sikhye (sweet Korean rice beverage)
Cherry tomatoes!
-Do you guys accept the marketplace currency? -Yes.

-Here it is -Thank you
Thank you
-Thank you -Have a great day
Let's head over to the waterfall now
[Tzuyang's best recommendation] [A clean valley in Gyeonggi provice!!]
The place is already... I forgot the word for it. It's not "pinan (refuge)" for sure.
-You mean "piseo (summering)?" -Lol, did I really say "pinan" omg
Please understand me. It's hot out here.
It's hot
Tap "main tourist spots" to see different valleys and waterfalls
Yongso waterfall is in the middle of the park
There are so many valleys and waterfalls
This interactive kiosk accommodates tourists' needs
What a nice day
We need to find a nice spot
This right here is the best spot

I don't know if it's because of the nice weather
I love this scene since it's surrounded by mountains
As long as you follow the safety guidelines, you should be able to have so much fun here
I bought some cherry tomatoes and wild strawberries
And Gapyeong county is well known for pine nuts
So everything else is the pine nut product
This is very sweet
Isn't wild strawberry normally sour? It's so sweet
It's very sweet
I love it here
Tasty!
This tastes like a typical nut
It should've been nicer if I brought some sliced watermelon
No one's around here
That means I need to chug some makgeolli
This is what I learned in the city of Seongju

Please add a clip as a reference
Should I try the pine nut makgeolli?
[She's in a good mood]
It feels great
Let's not forget to take care of trash
Cooking is prohibited here, but eating here is fine
You can't grill any meat or cook food, but you can eat to-go food such as fried chicken and pork feet
So, it's great
That's the moon!
Right?
I want to be a cloud
I should at least dip my feet since I came here
This is like an acupressure mat!
It's so cold
The water is crystal clear
Wriggle wriggle

Look it's so clean
OMG It splattered all over
Oh no my pants
I'm going to get out of the water
I came to Yongso waterfall today
If you are to travel in Gyeonggi province, it's great to use the marketplace currency since it gives you additional 10% credits on top of the funds
But please make sure to follow COVID-19 safety regulations and keep the social distancing
Also, please don't forget to take care of the trash after
Thank you everyone
What is this? It's not mine
Please do not litter
